---
title: "157: Waffle chart"
date: "2025-10-15"
categories:
  - geom_waffle
  - gtExtras
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Load data

```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

# gt save function
gt_save_crop <- function(data,
                         file = NULL,
                         bg = "white",
                         whitespace = 50,
                         zoom = 2,
                         expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}


```

### Waffle plot

```{r waffle-plot, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

coaching_data <- readr::read_csv("coaching-data.csv")

waffle_data_top20 <- coaching_data |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_pay_num = readr::parse_number(total_pay),
    buyout_num = readr::parse_number(buyout)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(total_pay_num), !is.na(buyout_num)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total_pay_num)) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 20) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(buyout_num)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    salary_squares = round(total_pay_num / 1e6),
    buyout_squares = round(buyout_num / 1e6),
    # adjust james franklin
    coach_label = dplyr::case_when(
      coach == "James Franklin" ~ "James Franklin (Fired)<br>Penn State",
      TRUE ~ stringr::str_c(coach, "<br>", team)
    )
  )

# order by buyout
coach_order_levels <- unique(waffle_data_top20$coach_label)

# pivot data
waffle_data_top20 <- waffle_data_top20 |>
  dplyr::select(coach_label, salary_squares, buyout_squares) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(salary_squares, buyout_squares),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "n"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric = dplyr::case_when(
      metric == "salary_squares" ~ "Annual Salary",
      metric == "buyout_squares" ~ "Contract Buyout"
    ),
    coach_label = factor(coach_label, levels = coach_order_levels)
  )

waffle_plot_top20 <- waffle_data_top20 |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(fill = metric, values = n)) +
  waffle::geom_waffle(
    color = "white", 
    size = 0.3, 
    n_rows = 10,
    flip = TRUE,
    radius = grid::unit(3, "pt"),
    height = 0.9,
    width = 0.9
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~coach_label, ncol = 4, strip.position = "top") +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) x * 10,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    "",
    values = c("Annual Salary" = "#E69F00", "Contract Buyout" = "#0072B2")
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "2025 College Football Head Coaches Salaries & Buyouts <br>",
    subtitle = "Each square represents $1 million<br>Ordered by contract buyout amount (blue)<br>Several coaches from a private school are excluded due to non-public salary data.<br>Higher buyouts indicate longer contracts, but buyout terms vary and don't always reflect immediate payment obligations.<br>",
    x = "",
    y = "Millions ($)",
    caption = "Data via sportsdata.usatoday.com<br>Viz by Chris at Bless your Chart"
  ) +
  hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum_rc() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.box.spacing = grid::unit(0, "cm"),
    legend.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 0, b = 10),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 11,
                                          margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 5)),
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(
      hjust = 0.5,
    ),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 10,
      lineheight = 1.2
    ),
    plot.caption = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    panel.spacing.x = grid::unit(1.25, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = grid::unit(1.25, "lines"),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(
      size = 8
    ),
    plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), "cm")
  )

waffle_plot_top20

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "coaching_waffle_top20.png",
  waffle_plot_top20,
  w = 8,
  h = 10,
  dpi = 300,
  type = 'cairo',
  bg = "white"
)

```

### Line score 

```{r lscore, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

line_score <- tibble::tribble(
  ~team,     ~inning_1, ~inning_2, ~inning_3, ~inning_4, ~inning_5, ~inning_6, ~inning_7, ~inning_8, ~inning_9, ~inning_10, ~points, ~fdowns, ~turnovers,
  "Georgia",         0,         0,         0,        "3",         0,         7,         3,         0,         7,          0,       20,      21,          1,
  "Auburn",          7,         3,         0,        "F",         0,         0,         0,         0,         0,          0,       10,      18,          1
)
uga_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/61.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>Georgia 20, Auburn 10</span>
       <span style='font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Possession-by-possession line score and relevant stats.<br>October 11, 2025 | 	Jordan-Hare Stadium, Auburn, AL</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/2.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>"
)


uga_tbl <- line_score |>
  dplyr::rename_with( ~ stringr::str_remove(.x, "inning_"),
                      dplyr::starts_with("inning_")) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team)  |>
  gt::gt()  |>
  gt::sub_missing(missing_text = "-") |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gt::cols_align(team, align = "left") |>
   gt::cols_align(columns = 5, align = "center") |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(uga_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<b>Season records</b>: UGA 5-1 (3-1 SEC), AUB 3-3 (0-3 SEC)<br><br>
        <b>Avg Starting Field Position</b>: UGA own 32, AUB own 26<br>
        <b>Yards per play</b>: UGA 4.3, AUB 4.1<br>
        <b>UGA Drive outcomes</b>:PUNT (3), TD (2), FG (2), FGA (1), DOWNS (1), HALF (1)<br> 
        <b>AUB Drive Outcomes</b>: PUNT (4), TD (1), FG (1), DOWNS (2), FUMBLE (1) HALF (1)<br>
        <b>3rd down conversions</b>: UGA 5-15, AUB 8-17<br>
        <b>Avg 3rd down distance</b>: UGA 7.8, AUB 4.9<br>
        <b>Penalties (total-yards)</b>: UGA 6-60, AUB 11-90<br>
        <b>Explosive plays (20+ yard gains)</b> UGA 2 (all passing), AUB 1 (rushing)<br>
        <b>F (First Downs)</b> UGA 21 (13 passing, 4 rushing, 4 penalty), AUB 18 (10 rushing, 5 passing, 3 penalty)<br>
        <b>T (Turnovers)</b> UGA 1 (missed 45-yard field goal), AUB 1 (fumble on goal line on UGA 1)<br>
        <hr style='border-color: black;'><b>Data via statbroadcast.com | Table by Chris at Bless your chart</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team = "",
    points = "P",
    fdowns = "F",
    turnovers = "T"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |>
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = '#ffffff',
    column_labels.text_transform = 'none',
    column_labels.font.weight = 'bold',
     table_body.border.bottom.color = "black",
    table_body.hlines.color = "black"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(1),
    columns = c(5, 7, 8, 10, 12, 13),
    fill = "#f892a7"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2),
    columns = c(2, 3),
    fill = "#feba9c"
  ) |>
    gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2),
    columns = c(5),
    fill = "#f892a7"
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 0.5,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
   gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_borders(
      sides = "bottom",
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(0.5)
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(rows = 1)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "1st Half", columns = c(2:5)) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "2nd Half", columns = c(6:11)) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(5), sides = "right",
                           color = "black", weight = 0.5) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc"))

gt_save_crop(uga_tbl,
             file = "linescore_uga.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "white")

uga_tbl

```
